retry_reason: Put operations always succeed (refcount decrement cannot fail); retrying would constitute a double-put leading to use-after-free.
contract_summary: Put wrapper that releases a reference on the anchored sk_buff (strp->anchor). After calling this function, the caller must not access strp or the anchor sk_buff, as the reference count has been decremented and the object may be freed. This function is typically invoked during TLS strparser teardown and must be paired with a prior get or allocation that established the reference.
